items.title: Amazon is testing Alexa+ in India with Hindi support
items.title_zh_hant: 亞馬遜在印度測試Alexa+，支援印地語
items.summary: Amazon sent emails to customers inviting them to test Alexa+

items.title: Google invests in A24 to build AI movie tools
items.summary: Google's DeepMind AI lab is teaming up with A24 to develop new movie production technologies that aim to help future filmmakers "expand their storytelling possibilities." As part of this new research and development col...

items.title: Alphabet paces for worst day in a year on AI concerns after high-profile exits
items.title_zh_hant: Alphabet因AI疑慮及高層離職，恐創一年來最大單日跌幅
items.summary: Google parent Alphabet has seen consecutive high-profile artificial intelligence researchers leave.

items.title: Meta's WhatsApp head to step down, will be replaced by Indian fintech founder Kunal Shah
items.title_zh_hant: Meta旗下WhatsApp負責人將卸任，由印度金融科技創辦人Kunal Shah接替
items.summary: Will Cathcart will step down as the head of WhatsApp and move into another role at the company. Kunal Shah will take over.

items.title: Valve is working with AMD to bring FSR 4 to the Steam Machine

items.title: Here’s how you can reserve a Steam Machine
items.summary: The Steam Machine is here, but getting one is a little complicated. Valve is taking preorders using a reservation system, which is intended to make the process more fair and harder for bots to exploit. However, it's a b...

items.title: Valve will finally let you build your own Steam Machine with SteamOS for desktop

items.summary: If you don't get lucky with Valve's Steam Machine reservation system, you can make your own Steam Machine instead. Valve says that "starting with the SteamOS 3.8 release, you can put together your own Steam Machine usin...

items.title: Analysis: Everything points to Burnham becoming PM within weeks
items.title_zh_hant: 分析：種種跡象顯示Burnham數週內將成為首相
items.summary: If no leadership contest presents itself, Andy Burnham may not have to wait until September to enter Number 10.

items.title: Ex DUP leader Donaldson guilty of child sex abuse charges including one of rape
items.title_zh_hant: 前DUP黨魁Donaldson性侵兒童罪名成立，含一項強暴罪
items.summary: The former MP is remanded in custody while he awaits sentencing for 18 offences.

items.title: 2-year Treasury note yield hits highest since February 2025
items.title_zh_hant: 兩年期公債殖利率創2025年2月以來新高
items.summary: The yield on the 10-year U.S. Treasury note — the key benchmark for U.S. government borrowing — rose four basis points, to 4.491%.

items.title: Clive Davis, music mogul behind Whitney Houston and Bruce Springsteen, dies aged 94
items.title_zh_hant: 音樂界巨擘Clive Davis逝世，享耆壽94歲，曾捧紅Whitney Houston與Bruce Springsteen
items.summary: The record company executive also worked with Billy Joel, Pink Floyd, Alicia Keys and Aerosmith.

items.title: Starmer's premiership in six charts
items.title_zh_hant: 六張圖表解析Starmer首相任期
items.summary: BBC Verify looks at the record of Sir Keir's time in government in six key areas since he took office in July 2024.
